case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. UNITED STATES FIRE INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UNITED STATES FIRE INSURANCE COMPANY $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,225.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
